race.comment: Open race to close out the card. WILIAMTHECONQUEROR (5) finally broke the maiden status at Doomben last time out and will have derived a bunch of confidence from that breakthrough victory. Thornton stays on top and can go right on with the job now. QUIT 'N' TAP (10) couldn't have been more impressive saluting by six lengths on debut and the step-up in trips suits. Top-three contender. SUBTERRAIN (8) has placed two from two around this circuit and may run a big race while fresh. NOIRE EMPEROR (4) was beaten 2.75 lengths into fourth when resuming last start over 1350m at Doomben. Fitter for that run and expected to be in the finish this time.
